---
title: "Query_data"
output: html_document
date: "2025-07-28"
---
## setup

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
setwd("~/Blue_Space_Survey_Analysis/Blue Space Survey Code")
getwd()
```

```{r load_packages}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(RColorBrewer)
```

```{r import_data}
# nvivo
query <- read_excel("condition_query.xlsx")

# Rename 
colnames(query)[1] <- "Respondents"

# Remove the leading number
query$Respondents <- sub("^\\d+\\s*:\\s*", "", query$Respondents)

# survey data
survey <- read_excel("raw_results_survey_20250605.xlsx")

unique(query$Respondents)
unique(survey$Respondents)
```

## Cross tab
Cross tab comparisons were not used in final analysis but retained here
for reference (McNemars used instead, see below)
```{r pair_data}
paired <- left_join(query, survey, by = "Respondents")
```

```{r cross tab - displeases}
table(
  paired$`A : Displeasing`,
  paired$`18. Would you consider providing a blue space (e.g., large nature pond or mini bucket pond) in your garden, allotment or other available outdoor space?`
)
displeased_only <- paired[paired$`A : Displeasing` > 0, ]

table(displeased_only$`18. Would you consider providing a blue space (e.g., large nature pond or mini bucket pond) in your garden, allotment or other available outdoor space?`)

```

```{r cross tab - pleased}
table(
  paired$`B : Pleasing`,
  paired$`18. Would you consider providing a blue space (e.g., large nature pond or mini bucket pond) in your garden, allotment or other available outdoor space?`
)
pleased_only <- paired[paired$`B : Pleasing` > 0, ]

table(
  pleased_only$`18. Would you consider providing a blue space (e.g., large nature pond or mini bucket pond) in your garden, allotment or other available outdoor space?`
)

```

```{r table compare - cross tab example}
# Create frequency tables
pleased_tab <- table(pleased_only$`18. Would you consider providing a blue space (e.g., large nature pond or mini bucket pond) in your garden, allotment or other available outdoor space?`)
displeased_tab <- table(displeased_only$`18. Would you consider providing a blue space (e.g., large nature pond or mini bucket pond) in your garden, allotment or other available outdoor space?`)

# Combine into a data.frame with all categories (fill missing with 0)
combined <- merge(
  as.data.frame(pleased_tab),
  as.data.frame(displeased_tab),
  by = "Var1",
  all = TRUE,
  suffixes = c("_Pleased", "_Displeased")
)

# Replace NA with 0
combined[is.na(combined)] <- 0

# Rename columns for clarity
colnames(combined) <- c("Response", "Count_Pleased", "Count_Displeased")

print(combined)

```

## Q16 - Q17 comparison 

```{r q16 and q17 comparison}
# Create themes with groups of taxa
  themes <- c(
  "Amphibians",
  "Birds", 
  "Fish",
  "Mammals",
  "Reptiles",
  "Other Taxa", # Crustacea, Cnidaria, Echinoderms, Bivlaves, Molluscs, Worms
  "Insects and Spiders", # insects and arachnids
  "General Nature",
  "Plants, Fungi, Lichen"
)

# Frequencies for q16
blue_space_freq <- c(
  63,   # amphibians
 527,  # birds
  93,   # fish
  295,   # mammals
  29, # reptiles
  33, # other taxa
  139, # Insects and Spiders
  5, # General nature
  53 # PLants, fungi and liches
)

# Frequencies for Wild Blue Space condition
wild_blue_space_freq <- c(
   27,   # amphibians
 130,  # birds
  34,   # fish
  163,   # mammals
  9, # reptiles
  0, # Other taxa
  64, # Insects and Spiders
  69, # General nature
  15 # PLants, fungi and liches
)

# data handling

# Create dataframe
df <- data.frame(
  Theme = themes,
  Blue_Space = blue_space_freq,
  Wild_Blue_Space = wild_blue_space_freq
)

# Calculate totals and proportions
df$Total <- df$Blue_Space + df$Wild_Blue_Space
df$Blue_Prop <- df$Blue_Space / df$Total
df$Wild_Prop <- df$Wild_Blue_Space / df$Total

# Reshape for ggplot
df_long <- df %>%
  dplyr::select(Theme, Blue_Space, Wild_Blue_Space) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Blue_Space, Wild_Blue_Space),
    names_to = "Condition",
    values_to = "Frequency"
  )

# Clean condition names
df_long$Condition <- gsub("_", " ", df_long$Condition)

#
df_diverging <- df %>%
  mutate(Blue_Space_neg = -Blue_Space,
         Theme_ordered = reorder(Theme, Total))

# Option 1: Use more breaks across the full range
plot2 <- ggplot(df_diverging, aes(x = Theme_ordered)) +
  geom_col(aes(y = Blue_Space_neg), fill = "#9ec9c9", alpha = 1) +
  geom_col(aes(y = Wild_Blue_Space), fill = "#7ea1a1", alpha = 1) +
  coord_flip() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", size = 0.5) +
  labs(title = "Wildlife Observed vs Wildlife Desired",
       x = "",
       y = "Frequency") +
  theme_classic() +
   theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16),      # Title size
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),     # X-axis tick labels
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14),     # Y-axis tick labels  
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),    # X-axis title
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 11)     # Y-axis title
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = c(-500, -400, -300, -200, -100, 0, 100, 200),
    labels = c("500", "400", "300", "200", "100", "0", "100", "200"),
    limits = c(-540, 200)
  )
plot2

# Save the plot at 400 DPI
ggsave("q19_plot.png", plot = plot2, 
       width = 12, height = 8, 
       dpi = 400, 
       units = "in")
```

## McNemars

```{r Mcnemar's Test Wildlife}
# bring in data
q14 <- read_excel("Matrix Coding Query_q14_Wild.xlsx")
q15 <- read_excel("Matrix Coding Query_q15_Wild.xlsx")
q14_q15 <- left_join(q14, q15, by = "Respondents")

# Check the unique values in your data (data is not binary)
cat("Unique values in Q14_wildlife:", unique(q14_q15$Q14_Wildlife), "\n")
cat("Unique values in Q15_wildlife:", unique(q14_q15$Q15_Wildlife), "\n")

# Convert to binary
q14_q15$Q14_binary <- ifelse(q14_q15$Q14_Wildlife >= 1, 1, 0)
q14_q15$Q15_binary <- ifelse(q14_q15$Q15_Wildlife >= 1, 1, 0)

# Create contingency table
table_binary <- table(q14_q15$Q14_binary, q14_q15$Q15_binary)
print(table_binary)

# Add names
dimnames(table_binary) <- list(
  Q14 = c("No", "Yes"),
  Q15 = c("No", "Yes")
)
print(table_binary)

# Run McNemar's 
mcnemar.test(table_binary)

```

```{r Mcnemar's Test Inland}
# bring in data
inland <- read_excel("Matrix Coding Query_Inland.xlsx")

# Check the unique values in your data (data is not binary)
cat("Unique values in Q14_wildlife:", unique(inland$Q14_inland), "\n")
cat("Unique values in Q15_wildlife:", unique(inland$Q15_inland), "\n")

# Convert to binary
inland$Q14_binary <- ifelse(inland$Q14_inland >= 1, 1, 0)
inland$Q15_binary <- ifelse(inland$Q15_inland >= 1, 1, 0)

# Create contingency table
inland_table_binary <- table(inland$Q14_binary, inland$Q15_binary)
print(inland_table_binary)

# Add names
dimnames(inland_table_binary) <- list(
  Q14 = c("No", "Yes"),
  Q15 = c("No", "Yes")
)
print(inland_table_binary)

# Run McNemar's 
mcnemar.test(inland_table_binary)

```

```{r Mcnemar's Test Therapeutic}
# bring in data
thera <- read_excel("Matrix Coding Query_Thera.xlsx")

# Check the unique values in your data (data is not binary)
cat("Unique values in Q14_thera:", unique(thera$Q14_thera), "\n")
cat("Unique values in Q15_thera:", unique(thera$Q15_thera), "\n")

# Convert to binary
thera$Q14_binary <- ifelse(thera$Q14_thera >= 1, 1, 0)
thera$Q15_binary <- ifelse(thera$Q15_thera >= 1, 1, 0)

# Create contingency table
thera_table_binary <- table(thera$Q14_binary, thera$Q15_binary)
print(inland_table_binary)

# Add names
dimnames(thera_table_binary) <- list(
  Q14 = c("No", "Yes"),
  Q15 = c("No", "Yes")
)
print(thera_table_binary)

# Run McNemar's 
mcnemar.test(thera_table_binary)

```

```{r Mcnemar's Test Coastal}
# bring in data
coast <- read_excel("Matrix Coding Query_Coastal.xlsx")

# Check the unique values in your data (data is not binary)
cat("Unique values in Q14_thera:", unique(coast$Q14_coastal), "\n")
cat("Unique values in Q15_thera:", unique(coast$Q15_coastal), "\n")

# Convert to binary
coast$Q14_binary <- ifelse(coast$Q14_coastal >= 1, 1, 0)
coast$Q15_binary <- ifelse(coast$Q15_coastal >= 1, 1, 0)

# Create contingency table
coast_table_binary <- table(coast$Q14_binary, coast$Q15_binary)
print(coast_table_binary)

# Add names
dimnames(coast_table_binary) <- list(
  Q14 = c("No", "Yes"),
  Q15 = c("No", "Yes")
)
print(coast_table_binary)

# Run McNemar's 
mcnemar.test(coast_table_binary)

```

```{r Mcnemar's Test Estuary}
# bring in data
estuary <- read_excel("Matrix Coding Query_Estuary.xlsx")

# Check the unique values in your data (data is not binary)
cat("Unique values in Q14_estuary:", unique(estuary$Q14_estuary), "\n")
cat("Unique values in Q15_estuary:", unique(estuary$Q15_estuary), "\n")

# Convert to binary
estuary$Q14_binary <- ifelse(estuary$Q14_estuary >= 1, 1, 0)
estuary$Q15_binary <- ifelse(estuary$Q15_estuary >= 1, 1, 0)

# Create contingency table
estuary_table_binary <- table(estuary$Q14_binary, estuary$Q15_binary)
print(estuary_table_binary)

# Add names
dimnames(estuary_table_binary) <- list(
  Q14 = c("No", "Yes"),
  Q15 = c("No", "Yes")
)
print(estuary_table_binary)

# Run McNemar's 
mcnemar.test(estuary_table_binary)

```

```{r Mcnemar's Test Colour}
# bring in data
colour <- read_excel("Matrix Coding Query_Colour.xlsx")

# Check the unique values in your data (data is not binary)
cat("Unique values in Q14_colour:", unique(colour$Q14_colour), "\n")
cat("Unique values in Q15_colour:", unique(colour$Q15_colour), "\n")

# Convert to binary
colour$Q14_binary <- ifelse(colour$Q14_colour >= 1, 1, 0)
colour$Q15_binary <- ifelse(colour$Q15_colour >= 1, 1, 0)

# Create contingency table
colour_table_binary <- table(colour$Q14_binary, colour$Q15_binary)
print(colour_table_binary)

# Add names
dimnames(colour_table_binary) <- list(
  Q14 = c("No", "Yes"),
  Q15 = c("No", "Yes")
)
print(colour_table_binary)

# Run McNemar's 
mcnemar.test(colour_table_binary)

```

```{r Mcnemar's Test Vast}
# bring in data
vast <- read_excel("Matrix Coding Query_Vast.xlsx")

# Check the unique values in your data (data is not binary)
cat("Unique values in Q14_vast:", unique(vast$Q14_vast), "\n")
cat("Unique values in Q15_vast:", unique(vast$Q15_vast), "\n")

# Convert to binary
vast$Q14_binary <- ifelse(vast$Q14_vast >= 1, 1, 0)
vast$Q15_binary <- ifelse(vast$Q15_vast >= 1, 1, 0)

# Create contingency table
vast_table_binary <- table(vast$Q14_binary, vast$Q15_binary)
print(vast_table_binary)

# Add names
dimnames(vast_table_binary) <- list(
  Q14 = c("No", "Yes"),
  Q15 = c("No", "Yes")
)
print(vast_table_binary)

# Run McNemar's 
mcnemar.test(vast_table_binary)

```

```{r Mcnemar's Test Limited}
# bring in data
limited <- read_excel("Matrix Coding Query_Limited.xlsx")

# Check the unique values in your data (data is not binary)
cat("Unique values in Q14_limited:", unique(limited$Q14_limited), "\n")
cat("Unique values in Q15_limited:", unique(limited$Q15_limited), "\n")

# Convert to binary
limited$Q14_binary <- ifelse(limited$Q14_limited >= 1, 1, 0)
limited$Q15_binary <- ifelse(limited$Q15_limited >= 1, 1, 0)

# Create contingency table
limited_table_binary <- table(limited$Q14_binary, limited$Q15_binary)
print(limited_table_binary)

# Add names
dimnames(limited_table_binary) <- list(
  Q14 = c("No", "Yes"),
  Q15 = c("No", "Yes")
)
print(limited_table_binary)

# Run McNemar's 
mcnemar.test(limited_table_binary)

```

```{r Mcnemar's Test Joy}
# bring in data
joy <- read_excel("Matrix Coding Query_Joy.xlsx")

# Check the unique values in your data (data is not binary)
cat("Unique values in Q14_joy:", unique(joy$Q14_joy), "\n")
cat("Unique values in Q15_joy:", unique(joy$Q15_joy), "\n")

# Convert to binary
joy$Q14_binary <- ifelse(joy$Q14_joy >= 1, 1, 0)
joy$Q15_binary <- ifelse(joy$Q15_joy >= 1, 1, 0)

# Create contingency table
joy_table_binary <- table(joy$Q14_binary, joy$Q15_binary)
print(joy_table_binary)

# Add names
dimnames(joy_table_binary) <- list(
  Q14 = c("No", "Yes"),
  Q15 = c("No", "Yes")
)
print(joy_table_binary)

# Run McNemar's 
mcnemar.test(joy_table_binary)

```

```{r Mcnemar's Test Dynamic}
# bring in data
dynamic <- read_excel("Matrix Coding Query_Dynamic.xlsx")

# Check the unique values in your data (data is not binary)
cat("Unique values in Q14_dynamic:", unique(dynamic$Q14_dynamic), "\n")
cat("Unique values in Q15_dynamic:", unique(dynamic$Q15_dynamic), "\n")

# Convert to binary
dynamic$Q14_binary <- ifelse(dynamic$Q14_dynamic >= 1, 1, 0)
dynamic$Q15_binary <- ifelse(dynamic$Q15_dynamic >= 1, 1, 0)

# Create contingency table
dynamic_table_binary <- table(dynamic$Q14_binary, dynamic$Q15_binary)
print(dynamic_table_binary)

# Add names
dimnames(dynamic_table_binary) <- list(
  Q14 = c("No", "Yes"),
  Q15 = c("No", "Yes")
)
print(dynamic_table_binary)

# Run McNemar's 
mcnemar.test(dynamic_table_binary)
```

```{r Mcnemar's Test Importance}
# bring in data
importance <- read_excel("Matrix Coding Query_Importance.xlsx")

# Check the unique values in your data (data is not binary)
cat("Unique values in Q14_importance:", unique(importance$Q14_importance), "\n")
cat("Unique values in Q15_importance:", unique(importance$Q15_importance), "\n")

# Convert to binary
importance$Q14_binary <- ifelse(importance$Q14_importance >= 1, 1, 0)
importance$Q15_binary <- ifelse(importance$Q15_importance >= 1, 1, 0)

# Create contingency table
importance_table_binary <- table(importance$Q14_binary, importance$Q15_binary)
print(importance_table_binary)

# Add names
dimnames(importance_table_binary) <- list(
  Q14 = c("No", "Yes"),
  Q15 = c("No", "Yes")
)
print(importance_table_binary)

# Run McNemar's 
mcnemar.test(importance_table_binary)
```

```{r Mcnemar's Test Improving}
# bring in data
improving <- read_excel("Matrix Coding Query_Improving.xlsx")

# Check the unique values in your data (data is not binary)
cat("Unique values in Q14_improving :", unique(improving $Q14_improving), "\n")
cat("Unique values in Q15_improving :", unique(improving $Q15_improving), "\n")

# Convert to binary
improving$Q14_binary <- ifelse(improving$Q14_improving >= 1, 1, 0)
improving$Q15_binary <- ifelse(improving$Q15_improving >= 1, 1, 0)

# Create contingency table
improving_table_binary <- table(improving$Q14_binary,improving$Q15_binary)
print(improving_table_binary)

# Add names
dimnames(improving_table_binary) <- list(
  Q14 = c("No", "Yes"),
  Q15 = c("No", "Yes")
)
print(improving_table_binary)

# Run McNemar's 
mcnemar.test(improving_table_binary)
```

```{r Mcnemar's Test Displeasing}

# bring in data
disp <- read_excel("Matrix Coding Query_Disp.xlsx")

# Check the unique values in your data (data is not binary)
cat("Unique values in Q14_disp :", unique(disp$Q14_disp), "\n")
cat("Unique values in Q15_disp :", unique(disp$Q15_disp), "\n")

# Convert to binary
disp$Q14_binary <- ifelse(disp$Q14_disp >= 1, 1, 0)
disp$Q15_binary <- ifelse(disp$Q15_disp >= 1, 1, 0)

# Create contingency table
disp_table_binary <- table(disp$Q14_binary,disp$Q15_binary)
print(disp_table_binary)

# Add names
dimnames(disp_table_binary) <- list(
  Q14 = c("No", "Yes"),
  Q15 = c("No", "Yes")
)
print(disp_table_binary)

# Run McNemar's 
mcnemar.test(disp_table_binary)
```

```{r Mcnemar's Test Neglect}

# bring in data
neglect <- read_excel("Matrix Coding Query_Neglect.xlsx")

# Check the unique values in your data (data is not binary)
cat("Unique values in Q14_neglect  :", unique(neglect$Q14_neglect), "\n")
cat("Unique values in Q15_neglect  :", unique(neglect$Q15_neglect), "\n")

# Convert to binary
neglect$Q14_binary <- ifelse(neglect$Q14_neglect >= 1, 1, 0)
neglect$Q15_binary <- ifelse(neglect$Q15_neglect >= 1, 1, 0)

# Create contingency table
neglect_table_binary <- table(neglect$Q14_binary,neglect$Q15_binary)
print(neglect_table_binary)

# Add names
dimnames(neglect_table_binary) <- list(
  Q14 = c("No", "Yes"),
  Q15 = c("No", "Yes")
)
print(neglect_table_binary)

# Run McNemar's 
mcnemar.test(neglect_table_binary)
```

```{r Mcnemar's Test Inaccessible}

# bring in data
inaccess <- read_excel("Matrix Coding Query_Inaccess.xlsx")

# Check the unique values in your data (data is not binary)
cat("Unique values in Q14_inaccess  :", unique(inaccess$Q14_inaccess), "\n")
cat("Unique values in Q15_inaccess  :", unique(inaccess$Q15_inaccess), "\n")

# Convert to binary
inaccess$Q14_binary <- ifelse(inaccess$Q14_inaccess >= 1, 1, 0)
inaccess$Q15_binary <- ifelse(inaccess$Q15_inaccess >= 1, 1, 0)

# Create contingency table
inaccess_table_binary <- table(inaccess$Q14_binary,inaccess$Q15_binary)
print(inaccess_table_binary)

# Add names
dimnames(inaccess_table_binary) <- list(
  Q14 = c("No", "Yes"),
  Q15 = c("No", "Yes")
)
print(inaccess_table_binary)

# Run McNemar's 
mcnemar.test(inaccess_table_binary)
```

```{r Mcnemar's Test Popularity}

# bring in data
popularity <- read_excel("Matrix Coding Query_Pop.xlsx")

# Check the unique values in your data (data is not binary)
cat("Unique values in Q14_popularity  :", unique(popularity$Q14_popularity), "\n")
cat("Unique values in Q15_popularity  :", unique(popularity$Q15_popularity), "\n")

# Convert to binary
popularity$Q14_binary <- ifelse(popularity$Q14_popularity >= 1, 1, 0)
popularity$Q15_binary <- ifelse(popularity$Q15_popularity >= 1, 1, 0)

# Create contingency table
popularity_table_binary <- table(popularity$Q14_binary,popularity$Q15_binary)
print(popularity_table_binary)

# Add names
dimnames(popularity_table_binary) <- list(
  Q14 = c("No", "Yes"),
  Q15 = c("No", "Yes")
)
print(popularity_table_binary)

# Run McNemar's 
mcnemar.test(popularity_table_binary)
```

```{r Mcnemar's Test Activities}

# bring in data
activities <- read_excel("Matrix Coding Query_Act.xlsx")

# Check the unique values in your data (data is not binary)
cat("Unique values in Q14_activities  :", unique(activities$Q14_activities), "\n")
cat("Unique values in Q15_activities  :", unique(activities$Q15_activities), "\n")

# Convert to binary
activities$Q14_binary <- ifelse(activities$Q14_activities >= 1, 1, 0)
activities$Q15_binary <- ifelse(activities$Q15_activities >= 1, 1, 0)

# Create contingency table
activities_table_binary <- table(activities$Q14_binary,activities$Q15_binary)
print(activities_table_binary)

# Add names
dimnames(activities_table_binary) <- list(
  Q14 = c("No", "Yes"),
  Q15 = c("No", "Yes")
)
print(activities_table_binary)

# Run McNemar's 
mcnemar.test(activities_table_binary)
```

```{r Mcnemar's Test Smell}

# bring in data
smell <- read_excel("Matrix Coding Query_Smell.xlsx")

# Check the unique values in your data (data is not binary)
cat("Unique values in Q14_smell  :", unique(smell$Q14_smell), "\n")
cat("Unique values in Q15_smell  :", unique(smell$Q15_smell), "\n")

# Convert to binary
smell$Q14_binary <- ifelse(smell$Q14_smell >= 1, 1, 0)
smell$Q15_binary <- ifelse(smell$Q15_smell >= 1, 1, 0)

# Create contingency table
smell_table_binary <- table(smell$Q14_binary,smell$Q15_binary)
print(smell_table_binary)

# Add names
dimnames(smell_table_binary) <- list(
  Q14 = c("No", "Yes"),
  Q15 = c("No", "Yes")
)
print(smell_table_binary)

# Run McNemar's 
mcnemar.test(smell_table_binary)
```

```{r Mcnemar's Test Pleasing}

# bring in data
pleasing <- read_excel("Matrix Coding Query_Pleasing.xlsx")

# Check the unique values in your data (data is not binary)
cat("Unique values in Q14_pleasing  :", unique(pleasing$Q14_pleasing), "\n")
cat("Unique values in Q15_pleasing  :", unique(pleasing$Q15_pleasing), "\n")

# Convert to binary
pleasing$Q14_binary <- ifelse(pleasing$Q14_pleasing >= 1, 1, 0)
pleasing$Q15_binary <- ifelse(pleasing$Q15_pleasing >= 1, 1, 0)

# Create contingency table
pleasing_table_binary <- table(pleasing$Q14_binary,pleasing$Q15_binary)
print(pleasing_table_binary)

# Add names
dimnames(pleasing_table_binary) <- list(
  Q14 = c("No", "Yes"),
  Q15 = c("No", "Yes")
)
print(pleasing_table_binary)

# Run McNemar's 
mcnemar.test(pleasing_table_binary)
```
